question: I am wondering if it is possible to store a key-value pair in Secret.yml. I want to be able to store an encryption key as a value and an id as its key which I can use to retrieve the encryption ke
selection_rationale: SO answer score 0. D1=3 D2=3 D3=3 D4=1 D5=2. G4 new coverage.

ground_truth.answer: Ya, secrets adalah pasangan kunci nilai. Anda dapat membuatnya menggunakan kubectl: kubectl create
